issue_summary: don't accept Store for binary fields -- it must always be YES
javadoc_before: /** * Create a stored field with binary value. Optionally the value may be compressed. * * @param name The name of the field * @param value The binary value * @param store How value should be stored (compressed or not) * @throws IllegalArgumentException if store is Store.NO */
javadoc_after: /** * Create a stored field with binary value. Optionally the value may be compressed. * * @param name The name of the field * @param value The binary value * @param store Must be Store.YES * @throws IllegalArgumentException if store is Store.NO * @deprecated Use {@link #Field(String, byte[]) instead} */
